title: polygala guilanica
intro: Polygala guilanica, also known as Iranian milkwort, is a plant species in the polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polygala guilanica include reducing inflammation, improving breathing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Polygala guilanica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
